translations.en: Foodmaker
a large and boisterous gargoyle.*
translations.zh: 體形龐大、性情豪放之魔像。*

translations.en: He carries a 'knife' large enough to be a sword!
translations.zh: 他手持一把大到可以當劍用的「菜刀」！

translations.en: "The False Prophet!" the gargoyle shouts. "Begone, begone!"
"An-bal-sil-fer!" the gargoyle shouts. "Gres por! Gres por!"
Half-jokingly, Iolo says, "We'd better do as he says."
translations.zh: 尤洛半開玩笑地說：「我們最好照他說的做。」

translations.en: "After all, we don't know what kind of meat that is!
translations.zh: 「況且，我們也不知道那是什麼肉！

translations.en: "To welcome you back, False Prophet!"
"The False Prophet!"
"To welcome you to my place of cooking."
"To offer you the best @food in all the world!"
"To not have food on me. To have you visit my shop."
translations.zh: 「吾身上並未帶有食物。請至吾的店鋪。」

translations.en: "To be famous among all gargoyles for the quality of my horseflesh!"
translations.zh: 「吾之馬肉品質聞名於所有魔像之中！」

translations.en: "To be called Foodmaker, not having a name yet."
translations.zh: 「吾被稱為膳師，尚未獲得真名。」

translations.en: "But to be the finest cook in the land!"
"To receive a name someday soon for my skill!"
translations.zh: 「憑藉吾之技藝，不久後必可獲賜真名！」

translations.en: "The goodscrafter? To be pathetic!" the huge gargoyle scowls.
translations.zh: 「工匠？實在可悲！」這位龐大的魔像皺眉道。

translations.en: "To have self-pity, when strength and long work will give success!"
translations.zh: 「自怨自艾？力量與長久的努力才能帶來成功！」

translations.en: "To wish to hear no more about that creature."
translations.zh: 「吾不願再聽到關於那個傢伙的任何事。」

translations.en: "To cook and serve food for all the gargoyles who live in these parts!"
translations.zh: 「為居住在這一帶的所有魔像烹調膳食！」

translations.en: "Also to guide and instruct the @wingless ones in cooking chores."
translations.zh: 「亦指導@wingless無翼者承擔廚房雜務。」

translations.en: "To have to watch their every move!"
"But to acknowledge that they are vital to our society."
translations.zh: 「然吾承認，他們對吾族社會不可或缺。」

translations.en: "Well, yes, of course to have that as well."
"But to be famous for my roast horseflesh!"
"To offer you some of this fine @food!"
"To not know what $Z is."
"But to gladly cook it for you if you tell me the recipe!"
translations.zh: 「然若汝告知食譜，吾便欣然為汝烹調！」

translations.en: "Yes, yes! To offer you this finely roasted @meat!"
translations.zh: 「是是！奉上此精心烤製之@meat肉食！」

translations.en: With a few strokes of his huge knife, the gargoyle cuts you a slice of @meat.
translations.zh: 魔像揮動巨刀幾下，為你切下一片@meat肉。

translations.en: Do you take the meat?
You
r party eats the profferred food.
translations.zh: 的隊伍吃下了奉上的食物。

translations.en: eat the profferred food.
The flavor is unlike anything you've had before.
translations.zh: 那滋味前所未有，難以形容。

translations.en: Iolo speaks. "I wonder what sort of @meat this is, $P."
translations.zh: 尤洛開口：「不知這是什麼@meat肉，$P。」

translations.en: The gargoyle beams with pride. "To ask you: Is it not the best @meat you have ever eaten?"
translations.zh: 魔像滿臉驕傲。「問汝：這不是汝所吃過最好的@meat肉嗎？」

translations.en: "To be saddened by your not liking!"
"To know of no finer cooker of @horseflesh than myself!"
"Wait!"
"To give you some fine horseflesh to take with you on your trip!"
translations.zh: 「贈汝些許精良馬肉，帶上路途！」

translations.en: Do you accept his gift?
The chef gives
you
$Y
#2 horse chop\s.
"Well then, to save it here for you!"
"To welcome you to come back when you are hungry again!"

translator_notes: 膳師為大塊頭豪放的魔像廚師，以馬肉料理聞名（暗示人類的馬史密斯被吃掉）。尤洛的評論保留幽默感。旁白分段結構（You/r party, eat/s）保持對應。
